commit_message:
docs: add resource_link content type to MCP documentation (#11207)

* docs: add resource_link content type to MCP documentation

Adds documentation for the `resource_link` content type introduced in the MCP specification (2025-06-18).

This feature was implemented in laravel/mcp PR #200 by @rupeshstha.

Changes:
- Added "Resource Link Responses" subsection under Resource Responses
- Updated table of contents
- Added examples for plain URI links, resource class/instance links, overrides, and annotations

* fixup: follow documentation conventions for resource_link section

- Remove TOC entry (#### subsections like Blob/Error are not listed in TOC)
- Simplify description to match the concise "To return X, use the Y method" pattern
- Remove verbose JSON wire payload example (not present in other response docs)
- Reduce to 3 focused code examples following the existing conventions

* formatting

---------

Co-authored-by: Taylor Otwell <taylor@laravel.com>
